name: Clear Site Data (One Click)
description: Clear the current site's cache, cookies, and storage — same as DevTools 'Clear site data'. Popup menu with more: clear all sites, history, custom clean, and memory usage. Keyboard shortcut for instant clear.

action.default_title: Clear Site Data — click for menu (Alt+Shift+C = instant clear)

clear-this-site.description: Instantly clear the current site's data
